title: abutilon muticum
intro: Abutilon muticum, also known as the coastal abutilon or mallow bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Abutilon muticum include soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried or made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
